## Security outcome

What acquisition, identity, provenance, policy, or integration behavior changes?

## Evidence

- [ ] Tests fail without the change and pass with it
- [ ] `cargo fmt`, Clippy, tests, and repository checks pass
- [ ] New rules include safe inert fixtures and expected outcomes
- [ ] Public formats or behavior have matching docs/schema updates
- [ ] No live malicious payload, credential, or unredacted sensitive path is included

## Compatibility

Describe lockfile/schema/CLI compatibility and any migration. State “none” when unchanged.

## Residual risk

What does this deliberately not detect or enforce?
